<script setup lang="ts">
import { RangeCalendar } from "@/ui/range-calendar"
import { CalendarDate } from "@internationalized/date"
import type { DateRange } from "reka-ui"
import { ref } from "vue"

import { Example } from "@/components/example"

const range = ref<DateRange>({
  start: new CalendarDate(new Date().getFullYear(), 1, 1),
  end: new CalendarDate(new Date().getFullYear(), 1, 7),
})
</script>

<template>
  <Example title="Basic Range Calendar">
    <RangeCalendar v-model="range" />
  </Example>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { ExampleWrapper } from "@/components/example"

import RangeCalendarBasic from "./RangeCalendarBasic.vue"
import RangeCalendarMultipleMonths from "./RangeCalendarMultipleMonths.vue"
</script>

<template>
  <ExampleWrapper>
    <RangeCalendarBasic />
    <RangeCalendarMultipleMonths />
  </ExampleWrapper>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { RangeCalendar } from "@/ui/range-calendar"
import { CalendarDate } from "@internationalized/date"
import type { DateRange } from "reka-ui"
import { ref } from "vue"

import { Example } from "@/components/example"

const range = ref<DateRange>({
  start: new CalendarDate(new Date().getFullYear(), 1, 10),
  end: new CalendarDate(new Date().getFullYear(), 2, 15),
})
</script>

<template>
  <Example title="Range Calendar with Multiple Months">
    <RangeCalendar v-model="range" :number-of-months="2" />
  </Example>
</template>
